overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a Viking warrior walking through a snowy mountain landscape at twilight, transitioning from a narrow rocky canyon to an open lakeside path with distant wooden ruins visible across the frozen water.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy canyon passage between tall rock walls

agents.ego_description: Viking warrior walking steadily through the narrow snow-covered canyon with a round shield strapped to their back

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
snow-dusted rock wall forming the right side of the canyon
snow-covered trail winding through the canyon
distant snow-capped mountains visible at the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a Viking character walking through a narrow, enclosed canyon passage with high rock walls on both sides. The path is covered in snow and leads toward distant mountains barely visible through the hazy blue twilight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain lakeside path with frozen water and distant ruins

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into an open lakeside area with frozen water visible to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snow-covered lakeside path, moving toward distant wooden ruins across the frozen lake

entered.detail: expansive frozen body of water visible to the left of the path
wooden posts and structures on the far shore suggesting abandoned docks or buildings
sparse evergreen trees dotting the snowy mountainside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide mountain lakeside environment as the character exits the canyon. A frozen lake stretches to the left with wooden ruins visible on the distant shore, while the path continues along the snow-covered terrain with rocky cliffs on the right and mountains ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into a vast, open mountain lakeside at twilight. It begins by trailing a Viking character through a narrow passage enclosed by high rock walls, where the snowy path leads toward hazy blue mountains in the distance. As the character moves forward, the restrictive walls give way and the scene opens into a wide landscape. The view expands to reveal a frozen lake stretching to the left with wooden ruins on the far shore, while the path continues along snow-covered terrain flanked by rocky cliffs and towering peaks.
